race.comment: POWDERFINGER (5) was a month between runs when comfortably accounted for finishing eleventh over 1200m at Warren. That followed a win at Binnaway at the previous outing. Enjoys a drop in grade so she can return to the winners' list with a return to form. In the right race to have that good form come around again. PATTERA (1) went fast early and held on to score by a long neck last time out over 1065m at Wagga Riverside. Should go forward from the awkward gate. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. GOLD SMILES (7) ran a better race last time and a repeat of that form will go a ways to measuring up again in a race that doesn't run deep with several key scratchings.
